code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have_best = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0

  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digit = false
  mut started = false

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
    else
      -1
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10 or b == -1

    if is_ws
      if has_digit
        let val = sign * cur
        let a = abs_int(val)
        if not have_best
          best = val
          best_abs = a
          have_best = true
        else if a < best_abs
          best = val
          best_abs = a
        end
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      has_digit = false
      started = false
    else if b == 45 and not started
      sign = -1
      started = true
    else if b == 43 and not started
      sign = 1
      started = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
      started = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if have_best
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
  end
end
